subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Thy letter hath come unto the presence of the Beloved. Rest thou assured, His glance of loving-kindness hath ever been directed towards the weak and the forlorn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز حق نامه ات بمنظر محبوب وارد مطمئن باش نظر عنایتش لازال بضعفا و غربا
